title: PostgreSQL Database Optimization & GraphQL API Platform
desc: Designed PostgreSQL schemas, indexing strategies, and Hasura GraphQL APIs to improve query performance and secure data access.

title: Snowflake Data Warehouse & Analytics Platform
desc: Built Python and SQL data pipelines integrating AWS S3 with Snowflake, enabling scalable analytics and reporting.

title: Salesforce CRM Analytics Dashboard Suite
desc: Developed Tableau CRM dashboards for SLA, churn, and opportunity tracking while integrating Salesforce with external systems.

title: Enterprise ETL Migration to SAP HANA
desc: Migrated large-scale Oracle datasets into SAP HANA and developed optimized ETL pipelines for enterprise reporting.

title: Real-Time Operational Reporting Platform
desc: Built SAP HANA analytical views and integrated Tableau, Power BI, and Lumira for real-time business insights.

title: CI/CD Enabled Database Engineering Framework
desc: Implemented Docker-based database environments and GitHub Actions pipelines to automate deployments and database workflows.

title: AWS-Powered Data Processing Pipelines
desc: Developed scalable ETL workflows using Python, AWS S3, EC2, and SQL to support enterprise analytics workloads.

title: Database Performance Tuning & Query Optimization
desc: Optimized SQL queries, indexing strategies, and database schemas to improve reporting performance and application responsiveness.
